name: Central Bank
description_short: Central Bank Tampa, FL — Central Bank is a full-service community bank founded in 2007 as a Minority Deposit Institution, offering personal, commercial,...
description_long: Central Bank was established in 2007 as a Minority Deposit Institution (MDI) in Tampa, Florida. Since its founding, the bank has expanded to include premium locations in Winter Park, St. Augustine, and Suwanee, Georgia. The bank operates as an FDIC-insured institution backed by the full faith and credit of the U.S. Government, positioning itself as a community-focused financial institution. Central Bank offers a comprehensive range of banking services across personal, commercial, and residential segments. Their service offerings include personal banking with treasury management tools, commercial and business banking accounts with online management capabilities, mortgage loans for home purchases and refinancing, and SBA lending programs for small business financing and cash flow needs. The bank provides state-of-the-art online banking technology, financial calculators for personal finance management, debit card services with no-fee ATM access through Bank of America's nationwide network, and standard services such as lost/stolen card reporting and account switching assistance. The bank distinguishes itself through its emphasis on relationship banking, highlighting that their strength lies in experienced bankers who understand local market dynamics and customer needs. As an MDI, Central Bank maintains a community-oriented approach with local bankers developing relationships with small businesses in their respective markets. The partnership with Bank of America for ATM access provides customers nationwide convenience despite the bank's limited physical footprint. Central Bank serves as a legitimate community banking option for customers seeking traditional full-service banking with local relationship management. However, the limited geographic presence (only four known locations across Florida and Georgia) and lack of specific details about product features, rates, or competitive advantages suggests this is a regional institution best suited for those in or near their service areas. The website provides adequate information for basic banking needs but lacks granular details about specific loan terms, deposit rates, or fee schedules.
services: Online banking with account management tools
SBA loans for small business financing and cash flow
Debit cards with nationwide ATM access
Lost and stolen card reporting services
pros: FDIC-insured deposits backed by U.S. Government full faith and credit
No-fee ATM access to Bank of America's nationwide network for debit card holders
Community bank with emphasis on local relationship banking and experienced bankers
Full-service offerings including personal, commercial, residential, and SBA lending
State-of-the-art online banking technology for account management
Founded as Minority Deposit Institution (MDI) with community development focus
Multiple convenient locations across Florida and Georgia
cons: Limited geographic footprint with only four known banking centers, restricting accessibility for most consumers
Website lacks specific information on deposit rates, loan terms, APRs, or fee schedules for comparison
No details provided about credit card offerings, savings account types, or CD rates
Minimal information about business banking product specifics or SBA loan terms and requirements

contact.address: 20701 Bruce B Downs Blvd, Tampa, FL 33647

best_for: Small business owners seeking relationship-based commercial banking in Florida or Georgia
Homebuyers in Central Bank's service areas looking for personalized mortgage lending
Customers in Winter Park, St. Augustine, Tampa, or Suwanee who prioritize local community banking relationships
diagnosis: Central Bank is best for small business owners and homebuyers in Florida and Georgia who value relationship-based community banking with experienced local bankers. The main caveat is the bank's extremely limited geographic presence—with only four known locations, it is inaccessible to the vast majority of U.S. consumers and only practical for those already in or relocating to their specific service areas.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
address: 20701 Bruce B Downs Blvd, Tampa, FL 33647
